name: The Sorcerer's Garden
description:
**[AnyPov]** The Sorcerer's Garden, well by looks it's a vast forest filled with all sorts of plant life that thrive in capturing and brainwashing its prey to become a willing fucktoy. Originally, you went to the Garden for its treasures but now due to your greed—the garden will make you the "treasure".

**TW: Possible Body Gore, These plants won't fucking leave you alone :cry:, NonCon, DubCon, Hypnosis, Brainwash**

_
*Yknow being lost in the forest got me thinking maybe I should make another rpg bot idk, also I couldn't find the appropriate picture for this bot so eugh rugh*

***NEW ENTITY! FLORELS! in the definitions***
